items.title: OpenAI announces new agent tooling for developers
items.summary: OpenAI describes new agent workflows and evaluation tooling.
items.content: OpenAI announced agent tooling for developers building LLM applications. The update focuses on evaluations, safety checks, and production monitoring for generative AI systems.

items.title: Developers debate Claude and Gemini coding workflows
items.summary: A ranking item about AI coding assistants and practical model tradeoffs.
items.content: The discussion compares Claude, Gemini, and local LLM tools for code review, agent planning, and daily software engineering work.
